name: Polyrocks Chemical Co., Ltd
summary: Polyrocks Chemical Co., Ltd researches, produces, and distributes environmental halogen-free flame retardant plastics. It offers environmental halogen-free flame retardant thermoplastic plastics, wire and cable materials, other materials, and compound plastics. It also provides environmental flame-retarded resins, functional master batches, and elastomeric products, which includes household appliances, decorative lighting, wires and cables, OA communication, and electrical and electronics. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Qingyuan City, China.
